creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
I have a complete install of x11/xorg (7.3).  The computer is a Dell Inspiron 5100 (2.8 GHz) with 512 M RAM and an ATI Radeon display card.  Xorg 7.2's radeon driver worked without a hitch.  Not so with 7.3.  I have the following video artifacts:

1) a 10-15 pixel wide vertical line running right through the middle of the GNOME icon on the upper panel to the bottom of the screen.

2) a "shimmering" effect particularly evident arount all fonts (pixels appear to "move" clockwise around all fonts).

3) images have reduced sharpness.

Fix: 

Workaround is to switch to VESA driver for now (which works perfectly if slightly slower).
How-To-Repeat: 

n/a
